items.title: Djokovic calls Serena's return 'truly inspirational'
items.summary: Novak Djokovic told Serena Williams that her sensational comeback to tennis is "truly inspirational" as both prepare for Wimbledon.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: World Cup Daily: Ronaldo's new golden boots, Messi...
items.summary: It's the final day of World Cup group stage action, as Cristiano Ronaldo and Lionel Messi (maybe) could play.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
